Thus ends the 54th Ch. entitled EFFECTS OF ASHTAKAVARGA in Kalyana Varmas SARAVALI.
Chapter 55.
Manifold Births
1. Acharya Kanakas school of thought dealing with Manifold Births is narrated in this Ch. for the
pleasure of the astrologers and the common folk.
2. Lord Brahma created this Universe at a time, when Cancer was ascending with its Lord and in
aspect to Jupiter, while the other 5 planets were in their own Signs. Should one have a
similar radix, he will rule over the three worlds enjoying the company of the celestial dames.
3. The Science of astrology delineates the immovable and the movable through respective
differences of time, omens, form etc.
4-5. If all the malefics be with strength, while benefics be bereft of it, one of the Viyoni (Viyoni
Rasis are Rasis other than Gemini, Virgo, Libra, Aquarius and the first half of Sagittarius) be
